brand.name: Hikaya
brand.description: All-in-one platform for Gulf creative professionals.

home.subheadline: Photographers, videographers, designers, and editors. Showcase your work, get hired, run your studio, deliver to clients, and sell what you make — without ever leaving the platform.
home.trustedBy: Built for the way the Gulf works

valueProps.portfolioBody: Editorial layouts that put the work first. Masonry, full-width spreads, or showreels — your call.
valueProps.hireBody: Clients send you inquiries. You apply to public job briefs. Conversations stay in one thread, with a paper trail.
valueProps.studioBody: Bookings, contracts, quotes, invoices, payouts, and team management — purpose-built for creative businesses.
valueProps.deliverBody: Pixieset-grade client galleries with favorites, downloads, and watermark control. Replaces WeTransfer over WhatsApp.

auth.signInSubtitle: Pick up where you left off — your studio, your clients, your work.
auth.signUpSubtitle: It takes a minute. Build a portfolio or hire your first creative — both start here.
auth.acceptTerms: I agree to Hikaya's <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.panelBody: Hikaya is the all-in-one platform Gulf creatives use to showcase work, get hired, run their studio, deliver to clients, and sell what they make.
auth.demoCredentials: Try <email>noor@hikaya.sa</email> / <password>password123</password> for the creator view, or <email>client@hikaya.sa</email> for the client view.
auth.demoNote: Backend is mocked in-memory; data resets on server restart.

errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.

me.title: Your account
me.subtitle: This is your account home. The dashboard, portfolio editor, bookings, and messages all branch from here.
me.nextBody: We're currently scaffolding feature surfaces. Auth is the first slice — portfolio, discover, and the studio CRM are queued up.

list.title: Quotes
list.headline: Build, send,
list.subtitle: Itemized quotes with VAT, an expiry, and a one-click approval link for your client. No PDFs, no email back-and-forth.
list.emptyHint: Build your first quote — it'll be ready to send in under a minute.
list.clientBody: You're signed in as a client. Sign in as a creator to send quotes.

builder.title: New quote
builder.subtitle: Itemize what you'll deliver, set a price, and send. VAT is calculated at 15% per ZATCA — included automatically.

client.title: Client
client.name: Client name
client.emailHint: Optional — used for the email approval CTA in production.

builder.notesPlaceholder: Includes raw files for the first dance only. Hard drive delivery in 4 weeks.
builder.submitHint: You'll be able to preview and send it from the next screen.
builder.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please review the form and try again.

detail.title: Quote
detail.headline: Quote {number}
detail.subtitle: For {name}.
detail.draftBody: Only you can see this quote. Send it to share an approval link with your client.
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this draft? This cannot be undone.
detail.sentBody: Share this link directly with your client. They can approve or reject from any device.
detail.approvedBody: Approved {when}. The contract is ready to sign.
detail.rejectedNoReason: The client didn't leave a reason.

viewer.headline: A quote for
viewer.subtitle: From {creator} via Hikaya. Approve to convert into a contract you can sign in one click.
viewer.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Out of budget; could you re-quote with two photographers instead?
viewer.rejectReasonHint: The creator will see this. Keep it kind.
viewer.expired: This quote has expired. Ask the creator to send a fresh one.
viewer.approvedBody: Approved {when}. The contract is ready for both parties to sign.

list.title: Contracts
list.headline: Sign once,
list.subtitle: Contracts auto-generate from approved quotes. Both parties sign by typing their name; the document locks once both sign.
list.emptyHint: Contracts are created automatically when a client approves a quote — start there.
list.clientBody: You're signed in as a client. Sign in as a creator to manage contracts.

detail.title: Contract
detail.headline: Contract {number}
detail.subtitle: With {client}. Total {total} (VAT included).
detail.shareHint: Anyone with this link can review and sign on the client side.
detail.cancelHint: Cancels the contract and frees both parties. Cannot be undone.
detail.cancelConfirm: Cancel this contract? This cannot be undone.
detail.signedBody: Both parties have signed. The contract is locked and a copy is preserved on file.

viewer.headline: Your contract,
viewer.subtitle: From {creator}. Total {total} (VAT included). Read carefully, then type your name to sign.
viewer.awaitingClient: Type your name below to sign.
viewer.lockedBody: Both parties have signed. This document is locked and on file with Hikaya.

sign.label: Sign by typing your name
sign.hint: Per Saudi e-signature norms, a typed name + timestamp is treated as a binding signature on Hikaya.
sign.acceptTerms: I have read and agree to the contract terms above.
sign.errorAlready: This party has already signed. Refresh to see the latest state.

scopeOfWork.title: Scope of work
scopeOfWork.description: What's being delivered, in plain language.

cancellationPolicy.title: Cancellation policy
cancellationPolicy.description: What happens if either party cancels.

usageRights.title: Usage rights
usageRights.description: Personal use, commercial license, portfolio rights.

additionalTerms.title: Additional terms
additionalTerms.description: Anything else — amendments, dispute resolution. Optional.

list.title: Client galleries
list.headline: Deliver beautifully —
list.subtitle: Curate the work, send a private link, and watch your client favorite their selects. No more WeTransfer. No more WhatsApp.
list.emptyHint: Create your first gallery — one per client, one per project.
list.visitorCount: {count, plural, =0 {Not opened yet} =1 {1 visitor} other {# visitors}}

create.title: New gallery
create.subtitle: Set up the basics now — you'll add images once it's created.

form.messagePlaceholder: Sara — favorites for the album by Friday…
form.messageHint: Shown above the gallery to the client.
form.coverUrlHint: Optional — leave blank to use a placeholder.
form.expiresInDaysHint: Optional. After this date the link still works but shows an expired badge.
form.allowDownloadsHint: Clients can save originals from the gallery.
form.watermarkPreviewsHint: Adds a diagonal watermark over each image; removed for purchased selects.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

manage.title: Manage gallery
manage.shareHint: Anyone with this link can view the gallery. Send it via the platform messaging when that ships.
manage.noImages: No images in this gallery yet.
manage.noImagesHint: Paste image URLs above — one per line — to get started.
manage.noFavoritesYet: No favorites yet. Once your client opens the link and hearts a few, the most-loved images will surface here.
manage.dangerHint: Removes the gallery, all its images, and any selections clients have made. This cannot be undone.
manage.deleteConfirm: Delete this gallery and all its data? This cannot be undone.

addImages.label: Add images by URL
addImages.hint: One URL per line. Up to 50 at a time. The eventual flow uploads directly to Cloudinary.
addImages.invalid: Add at least one valid URL.

viewer.emptyHint: The creator hasn't added images yet. Check back soon.

portfolioEditor.title: Edit your portfolio
portfolioEditor.headline: Make it
portfolioEditor.subtitle: Edit your public profile and curate the work that lands when someone searches for you. Changes go live immediately.

sections.profileSubtitle: What clients see at the top of your page. Both languages, please — bilingual creators rank higher in discover.
sections.portfolioSubtitle: Drag-free reorder via the arrows, hover to delete. Add new images by URL — the eventual flow uploads directly to Cloudinary.

profile.bioHint: Up to 500 characters. Talk to your future client like a person, not a portfolio.
profile.disciplinesHint: {remaining} more available. Pick the disciplines that best describe your work — first one is your primary.
profile.startingPriceHint: Optional — appears as "from SAR …" on your card.
profile.layoutHint: How your work appears on your public page.

layouts.MASONRYHint: Variable-height columns. The default for varied work.
layouts.EDITORIALHint: Alternating wide + paired tiles, magazine-spread feel.
layouts.REELHint: Horizontal scroll for showreels and video work.

items.emptyHint: Add your first piece — even one strong image is better than nine weak ones.

add.urlHint: Leave empty to insert a placeholder while you find the real image.

noProfile.label: Client account
noProfile.title: You're signed in as a client.
noProfile.body: Only creator accounts have a portfolio. To edit one, sign in as a creator — or create a new account and choose "Showcase my work".
noProfile.demoHint: Demo: sign in with noor@hikaya.sa / password123 to see the editor.

studio.title: Studio dashboard
studio.headline: The business side,
studio.subtitle: Bookings, clients, and revenue in a single command center. Everything below is mocked — wire to @hikaya/api when you're ready.
studio.mockNote: Mock data — bookings + clients live in memory and reset on server restart.

upcoming.title: Upcoming
upcoming.empty: No bookings in the next two weeks. Quiet stretch — use it.

inquiry.title: Send an inquiry
inquiry.subtitle: Tell the creator about your project. They'll see it instantly and have 48 hours to respond.
inquiry.panelBody: Inquiries on Hikaya stay on Hikaya. The creator gets a notification, the conversation lives in one thread, and the paper trail is yours forever.

form.locationDetailHint: e.g. "Edge of the World, 2-day trip" or "Corniche, sunset window".
form.descriptionHint: 20+ characters. Mood, deliverables, anything they should know upfront.
form.errorCreatorNotFound: We couldn't find that creator. They may have removed their profile.

inquiries.title: Your inquiries
inquiries.subtitle: Every project request you've sent. Status updates appear here in real time once you've connected an account.
inquiries.empty: You haven't sent any inquiries yet.
inquiries.emptyHint: Find someone whose work you love, then tell them about your project.
inquiries.sentBody: We've notified the creator. They have 48 hours to respond — you'll see status updates here.

discover.title: Discover creatives
discover.headline: Photographers, designers, filmmakers —
discover.subtitle: Curated creatives across Saudi Arabia. Filter by city, discipline, or availability — or just browse and let the work do the talking.
discover.count: {count, plural, =0 {No creatives match} =1 {1 creative} other {# creatives}} on Hikaya
discover.empty: No creatives match these filters yet.
discover.emptyHint: Try clearing a filter, or check back soon — we're onboarding more talent every week.
